sections.title: Transfer Between Wallets
sections.description: The most requested feature is here! Move money from one wallet to another - smooth and easy, just like it should be.

sections.title: Custom Start Dates
sections.description: Set your monthly start date or weekly start day - so your budgets finally match your payday cycle.

sections.title: New Wallet Selector
sections.description: I heard you - the old wallet picker was painful. Now it's a clean, easy-to-scroll list! No more swipe-swipe chaos.

sections.title: Reorder Wallets & Categories
sections.description: Sort them however you like. Make Spenzy truly yours and record expenses the way that feels natural.

sections.title: More AI Usage
sections.description: Your AI usage now resets weekly! That means more scans, more smarts, and more splits!

sections.title: Non Decimals Numpad
sections.description: New non-decimal numpad with a "000" key for lightning-fast entry. You can grab it on settings!

sections.title: Improvements
items: Use the same emoji across multiple categories
Now wallet expense exports show converted vs original amounts when using foreign-currency wallets
